tech: HTML, Tailwind CSS, Vue 3, Nuxt, Capacitor, Android Studio
title: ZenBreaths â€” Guided Breathing App
description: A cross-platform guided breathing and meditation app built with Vue 3 + Nuxt, wrapped as a native Android app via Capacitor. Features customizable session durations, visual breathing guides (inhale/hold/exhale animations), haptic feedback, and ambient sound options.

images.title: Breathing Guide
images.desc: Animated breathing exercise guide with inhale-hold-exhale cycles.

images.title: Session Timer
images.desc: Track meditation and breathing session duration and progress.

images.title: Settings
images.desc: Adjust breathing patterns, sound themes, and session reminders.
